training_frequency: every 2 years if still employed in that role, within 6 months of starting the job role
required_topics: Identification of individuals at risk for trafficking
Difference between labor vs sex trafficking relevant to lodging/food/truck stop employees
Role of employees in reporting and responding to trafficking
harbor_alliance_actions: develop a model curriculum if an employer does not administer its own
risks_or_constraints: violations can result in fines up to $1,500 per offense
notes: The training must be completed within 6 months of starting the job role and every 2 years thereafter if still employed in that role.
